---
name: snake
description: A simple snake game implementation in Python.
---

# Goal

Create a game in python using pygame.

Player starts off as a small snake character comprising of 2 blocks(2 units)of length. There is a square where if the head of the player touches it the length of the snake increases by 1. Keep generating a block in a random position and after the block has been touched bu the head of the snake the block disappears and a new one generates. The snake will always travel forwards but the player can change the direction of the snake that it travels in. When the snake touches the edges of the playing area or it's own body then game is over and display the length of the snake.
